title: The Exact Value of R(B10, B10)
lean_gate_reason: The exact intended statement is already known in prior art, so Lean would be archival formalization rather than the shortest remaining path to a sealed publication packet.
micro_paper_assessment: Fails the micro-paper lane because the exact theorem R(B10,B10)=42 is already settled in prior art. The Paley(41) witness remains a compact rederivation, not a frontier result.
family_affinity: high; exact diagonal book-Ramsey point with a native Paley/self-complementary witness template
generalization_signal: moderate; the codegree-based witness template may transfer to nearby diagonal book instances when a suitable strongly regular graph exists
strongest_honest_claim: The Paley coloring of K_41 gives a correct lower-bound witness showing R(B10,B10) >= 42, but the exact value R(B10,B10)=42 is already a known theorem from prior art.
candidate_theorem_slice: The Paley coloring of K_41 contains no monochromatic B10, rederiving the known exact value R(B10,B10)=42.
